mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.title, i.description, i.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, i.location_id, l.name AS location_name, i.publish_date, i.expiry_date, i.status, i.owner_type, i.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, i.phone, i.views, i.created_at FROM lost_found_item i LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON i.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_location l ON i.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE i.id = #{itemId} AND i.is_deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.title, i.description, i.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, i.location_id, l.name AS location_name, i.publish_date, i.expiry_date, i.status, i.owner_type, i.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, i.phone, i.views, i.created_at FROM lost_found_item i LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON i.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_location l ON i.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE i.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.created_at DESC

SELECT i.id, i.title, i.description, i.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, i.location_id, l.name AS location_name, i.publish_date, i.expiry_date, i.status, i.owner_type, i.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, i.phone, i.views, i.created_at FROM lost_found_item i LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON i.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_location l ON i.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.created_at DESC

SELECT i.id, i.title, i.description, i.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, i.location_id, l.name AS location_name, i.publish_date, i.expiry_date, i.status, i.owner_type, i.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, i.phone, i.views, i.created_at FROM lost_found_item i LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON i.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_location l ON i.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE i.status = 'pending' AND i.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lost_found_item (title, description, category_id, location_id, publish_date, expiry_date, status, owner_type, user_id, phone) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{locationId}, #{publishDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{status}, #{ownerType}, #{userId}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE lost_found_item SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{itemId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE lost_found_item SET status = 'expired', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'pending' AND expiry_date < CURDATE() AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND title = #{title} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS totalItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_deleted = 0) AS pendingItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE status = 'claimed' AND is_deleted = 0) AS claimedItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE status = 'expired' AND is_deleted = 0) AS expiredItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE owner_type = 'lost' AND is_deleted = 0) AS lostItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item WHERE owner_type = 'found' AND is_deleted = 0) AS foundItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim WHERE status = 'pending') AS pendingClaims

SELECT c.name AS category, COUNT(i.id) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.owner_type = 'lost' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lostCount, SUM(CASE WHEN i.owner_type = 'found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS foundCount FROM lost_found_item i LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT l.name AS location, COUNT(i.id) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount FROM lost_found_item i LEFT JOIN sys_location l ON i.location_id = l.id WHERE i.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY l.name ORDER BY count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE lost_found_item SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{itemId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM lost_found_item WHERE id = #{itemId} AND status = 'pending' AND expiry_date >= CURDATE() AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM item_claim WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND claimer_id = #{userId} AND status != 'rejected'
